en: Most English learners say these words wrong Do you
ko: 대부분의 영어 학습자들이 이 단어들을 잘못 발음해. 너는?

en: Awkward awkward Notice there is a silent letter
ko: Awkward, awkward. 묵음이 있는 거 알겠지?

en: different This also has a silent letter different family
ko: different. 이것도 묵음이 있어. different. family

en: family This also has a silent letter family Let's say this sentence together My
ko: family. 이것도 묵음이 있어. family. 이 문장을 같이 말해보자. My

en: family is awkward and different My family is awkward and different
ko: family is awkward and different. My family is awkward and different.
더 많은 영어 레슨을 위해 구독해줘
